vulnerabilities.title: BOLA: Accessible with ID=2
vulnerabilities.description: Endpoint returned 200 when object ID was changed from 1 to 2.
vulnerabilities.poc_request:
GET https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/2
  User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
  Accept: application/json, text/html, */*
  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
vulnerabilities.poc_response:
HTTP 200 (514ms)
  Content-Length: 99
  Body: {
  "userId": 1,
  "id": 2,
  "title": "quis ut nam facilis et officia qui",
  "completed": false
}
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement object-level authorization checks. Verify the requesting user has permission to access the specific object.

vulnerabilities.title: Auth Bypass: Endpoint accessible without authentication
vulnerabilities.description: Endpoint returns successful response without valid authentication headers.
vulnerabilities.poc_request:
GET https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1
  User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
  Accept: application/json, text/html, */*
  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
vulnerabilities.poc_response:
HTTP 200 (598ms)
  Content-Length: 83
  Body: {
  "userId": 1,
  "id": 1,
  "title": "delectus aut autem",
  "completed": false
}
vulnerabilities.remediation: Enforce authentication on all API endpoints. Use proven auth mechanisms.

vulnerabilities.title: Method Override: PUT accepted (original: GET)
vulnerabilities.description: Endpoint accepts PUT method in addition to GET.
vulnerabilities.poc_request:
PUT https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1
  User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
  Accept: application/json, text/html, */*
  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict allowed HTTP methods per endpoint. Implement proper RBAC.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Headers: DENY/SAMEORIGIN, HSTS
vulnerabilities.description: Response is missing security headers: DENY/SAMEORIGIN, HSTS
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add standard security headers to all API responses.

vulnerabilities.title: Shadow API: Undocumented Endpoint
vulnerabilities.description: Endpoint https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1 is not documented in any API specification.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Document all API endpoints. Remove deprecated/unused APIs.

vulnerabilities.title: Shadow API: Undocumented Endpoint
vulnerabilities.description: Endpoint https://server.ethicalads.io/api/v1/decision/? is not documented in any API specification.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Document all API endpoints. Remove deprecated/unused APIs.

vulnerabilities.title: No Rate Limiting: 20/20 requests succeeded
vulnerabilities.description: Sent 20 rapid requests; 20 returned success. No rate limiting detected.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement rate limiting per client/IP. Use throttling mechanisms.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection Indicator in Response
vulnerabilities.description: SQL error message detected when injecting: 1; DROP TABLE users--
vulnerabilities.poc_request:
GET https://server.ethicalads.io/api/v1/decision/?q=1%3B+DROP+TABLE+users--&search=1%3B+DROP+TABLE+users--&input=1%3B+DROP+TABLE+users--
  User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
  Accept: application/json, text/html, */*
  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
vulnerabilities.poc_response:
HTTP 403 (658ms)
  Content-Length: 4574
  Body: <!DOCTYPE html>
